title: Monster Can Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a Monster Energy can.
body:
# Monster Can Totem

Replaces the Totem of Undying with a Monster Energy can.

This resource pack adds a pixelated Monster can as your totem while keeping a clean Minecraft style. Perfect for PvP players, survival worlds, late-night grinders, and cursed gameplay screenshots.

## Features
- Custom Monster can totem texture
- Transparent background
- 128x texture resolution
- Lightweight resource pack
- Meme/PvP aesthetic

## Compatibility
Supports most versions from 1.14 up to 26.1.2.

## Notes
Recommended for zero sleep gameplay.
